dublinCore.dc:title: 117 HR 8874 IH: Homeland Security Capabilities Preservation Reporting Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Carter of Louisiana (for himself and Mr. Thompson of Mississippi) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Homeland Security

form.official-title: To amend the James M. Inhofe National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2023 to require recurring reports on the transition of jurisdictions no longer eligible for Urban Area Security Initiative funding, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Homeland Security Capabilities Preservation Reporting Act of 2026.

section.header: Reports on transition of jurisdictions no longer eligible for Urban Area Security Initiative funding
section.text: Paragraph (1) of section 7102(b) of the James M. Inhofe National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2023 (Public Law 117–263) is amended, in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by inserting and every three years thereafter after Not later than 18 months after the date of the enactment of this Act.
